payload.answer: I see a conflict: existing memory says Sam works at Goldman, but the new info says Sam left Goldman for Point72. Which is correct (and when)?
payload.decision: Do not overwrite durable memory yet; flag conflict and request clarification.

entity_resolution.reason: Two mutually exclusive employment claims exist for the same person (Goldman vs Point72). Without a source/timestamp, updating durable memory would risk committing an incorrect current fact.

payload.intent: Resolve conflict about Sam’s employment (Goldman vs Point72)

memory_cards.statement: There is conflicting information about Sam’s employment: existing memory says Sam works at Goldman, but new context indicates Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.

details: Conflict flagged instead of overwriting existing durable memory due to mutually exclusive employment claims.

repair_options: Confirm current employer for Sam (Goldman or Point72) and provide an approximate date of change.
If both are true at different times, store a timeline (e.g., worked at Goldman until <date>, then joined Point72).
If one of the statements is incorrect, specify which to discard.
